violations.text: The hand-washing sink was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Walk-in cooler was observed held at 43 - 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Milk observed with a temperature of 43 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Owner/operator adjusted temperature during inspection. Service call to be placed if temperature in this unit does not go down to 41 degrees F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The door to the outside, located at the store entrance, is not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom of the door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

Utensils (spoons) in the small glass reach-in observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips must be obtained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in condenser fan guard, the milk shelving, and the piping under the 3-bay sink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. These areas must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2025
The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. Areas are cracking and pieces are missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The hand-washing sink was lacking paper towels. Paper towels must be available at all times for proper hand-washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Deli sandwiches and salads, packaged in the food establishment, are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler condenser fan, the white milk shelving, the piping under the 3-bay sink, and the slush machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. These areas must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. Areas are cracking and pieces are missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
